context.goal: Deliver a deterministic Angular prompt-sanitization workflow where masked output is the default result and individual masks can be disabled by the user.

objectives.objective: Reduce the interaction model to the shortest safe path.
Render result state declaratively from typed scan state.
Keep primary actions visible and trustworthy.

antiPatterns.item: manual DOM injection for core behavior

objectives.objective: Normalize detection rules by locale and confidence.
Eliminate shared mutable regex state during scans.
Recompute masked output from toggle state without lossy edits.
Persist only the smallest safe prompt session context.
Create extensive unit fixtures for target locales.
Cover critical browser workflow with Playwright.
Log commands and results under .tmp and durable findings under .notes.

deliverables.deliverable: Removal or replacement of obsolete flows
